scripts.be: cd backend && uv run uvicorn app.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000
scripts.migrate: cd backend && uv run alembic upgrade head
scripts.makemigration: cd backend && uv run alembic revision --autogenerate -m "${1:-change}"
scripts.lint: cd frontend && pnpm lint && cd ../backend && ruff check .
scripts.format: cd frontend && pnpm format && cd ../backend && ruff format .
scripts.gen:openapi: cd backend && uv run python -m app.scripts.dump_openapi > ../openapi.json
scripts.gen:types: devbox run gen:openapi && cd frontend && pnpm exec openapi-typescript ../openapi.json -o src/lib/api-types.ts
scripts.gen:types:watch: cd backend && uv run watchfiles --filter python "sh -c 'python -m app.scripts.dump_openapi > ../openapi.json && (cd ../frontend && pnpm exec openapi-typescript ../openapi.json -o src/lib/api-types.ts)'" app
scripts.check:types: devbox run gen:types && git diff --exit-code -- openapi.json frontend/src/lib/api-types.ts
